_doc: Hand-authored faithful-replay fixtures. Deterministic first-match rules; unmatched commands return an empty array.

rules.match: or jobs logs e5a6c7d8-5555-4abc-9def-000000000005 --level Error --output json

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any unmatched uip command returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent enumerates folders to locate the folder that owns the job under investigation.
Agent fetches the job's execution details.
OPTIONAL — agent may pull error-level logs for additional detail; min:0 = tracked-but-not-required.
